summary: Tested admin CMS (TOTP auth + content + image upload) end-to-end. 20/20 backend pytest tests pass and full Playwright UI flow passes (login with valid TOTP, login fail with wrong code, edit company name in Empresa tab → visible on /, reset to defaults, /admin guard redirect, logout). Public site continues to render Caterpillar 420F2 IT correctly via ContentContext.
passed_tests: POST /api/auth/login Shintergyadmin + valid TOTP -> 200 with access_token
POST /api/auth/login wrong code -> 401
POST /api/auth/login non-existent user -> 401
GET /api/auth/me with Bearer -> 200 (totp_secret stripped from response)
GET /api/auth/me without token -> 401
GET /api/auth/me invalid token -> 401
GET /api/content (public) -> 200 with all 8 keys (company, social, hero, maquina, zonasCobertura, advantages, workProcess, galleryImages)
PUT /api/content without token -> 401
PUT /api/content with token persists changes (verified via subsequent GET)
POST /api/content/reset restores DEFAULT_CONTENT (company.name == 'Shíntergy')
POST /api/content/reset without token -> 401
POST /api/images/upload without token -> 401
POST /api/images/upload PNG with token -> 200 returns id+url+mime_type
GET /api/images/{id} returns binary with correct image/png Content-Type
POST /api/images/upload text/plain -> 400
POST /api/images/upload >6MB -> 400
GET /api/images requires auth (401 without, 200 list with)
DELETE /api/images/{id} with token deletes; subsequent GET -> 404
DELETE /api/images/{id} without token -> 401
Frontend /admin/login pre-fills 'Shintergyadmin', has 6-digit TOTP input
Frontend wrong TOTP shows toast 'Usuario o código incorrecto'
Frontend valid TOTP redirects to /admin
Frontend /admin shows all 7 tabs (Empresa, Hero, Máquina, Imágenes, Listas, Ventajas, Galería) and admin-save / admin-ver-sitio / admin-logout / admin-reset buttons
Frontend edit company.name in Empresa tab + Guardar persists; new value visible on / via ContentContext
Frontend 'Restaurar originales' restores company.name to 'Shíntergy' on /
Frontend logout clears session; visiting /admin redirects to /admin/login when no token
Public site / continues to render: Caterpillar, 420F2, Xalapa, Operador (no regression)
critical_code_review_comments: auth.py uses HS256 JWT with JWT_SECRET from .env (good). Token type=access enforced. totp valid_window=1 to handle clock drift (sane).
get_current_admin properly strips 'totp_secret' before returning admin doc (verified in test).
image_routes.py: ALLOWED_MIME and 6MB cap enforced, base64 stored in MongoDB, Cache-Control public 7 days on serve. Good.
content_routes.py: single-document model with key=site_content_v1, _id excluded from response, upsert+seed_content fallback. DEFAULT_CONTENT is a comprehensive mirror of mock.js.
Minor: rotate-totp endpoint exists but is not exposed in UI; if admin loses device they need backend access. Consider documenting this for the user.
Minor: AdminLogin handles only HTTP error from server (wrong username gives same generic 401, which is correct for security).
Minor: AdminDashboard uses confirm() (browser native) for reset; ok for an internal tool.
Minor: Admin password is TOTP-only; no password fallback. Single admin enforced via unique index on admin_users.username (good).
Minor: Rate limiting / brute-force lockout on /api/auth/login is not implemented. Low risk for single admin TOTP but worth noting.
test_credentials: Admin username: Shintergyadmin · TOTP secret: KHXP3AGX6ZQRL5UML6HZARPOUOCNBNIN (use pyotp.TOTP(secret).now() for current 6-digit code).
seed_data_creation: Test created/deleted one PNG image via /api/images. Content modified to 'TEST_Shintergy_Modified' and 'TEST_Shintergy_UI' but restored to defaults via /api/content/reset and tests teardown. No leftover test data in DB after run.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend admin/CMS pytest at /app/backend/tests/test_admin_cms.py (uses pyotp + requests, no auth pre-seed needed beyond startup admin seed). Existing quote test at /app/backend/tests/test_quotes_retro.py (iteration 3) still relevant for retroexcavadora cotizador. Frontend admin routes: /admin/login and /admin (guarded). data-testids: admin-login-form, admin-username, admin-totp, admin-login-submit, admin-save, admin-logout, admin-ver-sitio, admin-reset. Public site reads via ContentContext (axios GET /api/content) with fallback to mock.js.
